overall.description: A static first-person view in a cyberpunk game engine showing a covered market walkway with a prominent 'Slaughter House' billboard, red paper lantern, and pedestrians ascending and descending stairs. The scene features neon-lit futuristic architecture in the background with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with cyberpunk aesthetic

pedestrian in purple shirt descending the stairs

entered.detail: Large rectangular advertisement billboard showing a person eating with 'SLAUGHTER HOUSE' text in bold letters
Traditional red paper lantern hanging from the ceiling structure above the billboard
Wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the market level
Multi-story futuristic building with green neon lighting and industrial metal structures
Silver metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk market walkway dominated by a large 'Slaughter House' billboard and hanging red paper lantern. Pedestrians continuously move up and down the concrete stairs on the left while futuristic neon-lit buildings rise in the background. The sheltered space features mixed natural and artificial lighting with sparse foot traffic passing through the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective of a cyberpunk market walkway where the interplay of light and movement defines the urban atmosphere. It begins with a focus on the sheltered concrete space, dominated by a large Slaughter House billboard and a hanging red paper lantern. As pedestrians continuously ascend and descend the stairs to the left, the eye is drawn past the sparse foot traffic toward the background. The scene then expands to reveal towering futuristic buildings illuminated by neon lights, blending natural daylight with artificial glows. Finally, the view settles into the rhythmic flow of the city, contrasting the gritty textures of the walkway with the glowing architecture above.
